_comment: Bridge Configuration — edit this file to set your data source and credentials.
_comment_data_source: 'rithmic' or 'cqg'. CQG uses the free AMP demo by default, no account needed.

rithmic._comment_system: System name — Rithmic Paper Trading Chicago

cqg._comment_user: CQG demo user (free, no account needed)

license._comment_server_url: Your license server URL. Leave empty to skip license check.

cqg_server_override._comment: Only needed if CQG changes their server. Leave as-is.
